description: Product Description Baby Shark 4 Piece Lunch Bag Set The Baby Shark backpack set is perfect for your little one! It includes a backpack, lunch bag, water bottle and pencil case, all featuring their favourite singing shark. The backpack has adjustable padded straps and a handy front pocket, while the lunch bag keeps food fresh and is easy to clean. The water bottle is perfect for staying hydrated on the go, and the pencil case is perfect for holding all of those school supplies. Your little one will love walking to school with their new bag and showing it off to all of their friends. Take Care of Me We really want to ensure you experience the longest life with your product, so please follow any care instructions provided with your product. Product Highlights 4 Piece Lunch Bag Set 3D Fins Featuring Their Favourite Singing Shark Mixed Materials Showcases their favourite singing shark The water bottle ensures they stay hydrated on the go, and the pencil case is perfect for storing pens and pencils. Make lunchtime even more fun with this Baby Shark 4 piece lunch bag set! The entire set is made from durable materials that are built to last. Features 3D fins The backpack is perfect for carrying school supplies or snacks, while the lunch bag is perfect for bringing along a healthy meal. We are Vanilla Underground! Welcome to authentic character and pop culture merch featuring your favourite throwbacks, the new, the trending, the musical and everything in between. We're a family-run business, here to satisfy your superfan cravings, make gift-giving a breeze and clothe your mini-mes top to toe in their favourite character brands.
